privileged_info_summary: The despeckle task applies GIMP's Despeckle filter (located at Filters → Enhance → Despeckle per official GIMP documentation) to reduce image noise. Task parameters: 90-second timeout, 7 maximum steps, sparse rewards. Verification requires achieving all four criteria: noise reduction ≥10%, image modification >1.0 intensity units, structural similarity ≥0.75, and noise direction (reduction, not increase). Pass threshold is 75% (3+ of 4 criteria). Test image is from Unsplash (photo-1506905925346) with synthetic fallback using ImageMagick noise addition (-attenuate 0.3). Output filename: despeckled_image.jpg. Critical issue: task.json lacks metadata field despite task structure supporting it.
